_comment: Flow 05 — US cross-country departure with Flight Following. Mirrors docs/howto_us_procedure_example.md §2 (KPAO departure → Leave Tower → NORCAL Approach for VFR advisories). Key US-only bits: 'squawk 1200' on LEAVING_FREQUENCY (US VFR code), REQUEST_FLIGHT_FOLLOWING on APPROACH freq returns 'squawk 4527' (stub) and transitions to APPROACH_CONTACT.
name: US cross-country + Flight Following — KPAO

context.callsign: November One Two Three Alpha Bravo

say.text: Palo Alto Ground November One Two Three Alpha Bravo at the ramp ready to taxi

say.note: Step 2 — Ground: ready for departure VFR on course
say.text: Palo Alto Ground November One Two Three Alpha Bravo holding short ready for departure on course
Palo Alto Tower November One Two Three Alpha Bravo ready for departure VFR to San Carlos on course

say.note: Step 4 — Tower: leaving frequency → US squawk 1200
say.text: November One Two Three Alpha Bravo leaving your frequency good day

say.note: Step 5 — NORCAL Approach: request Flight Following
say.text: NORCAL Approach November One Two Three Alpha Bravo two thousand five hundred VFR request flight following
